title: Tick Control in Mount Pleasant, Westchester | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Mount Pleasant, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Affordable rates $125-$325. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Mount Pleasant residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's wooded landscapes and proximity to natural preserves. Our professional tick control services protect your family, pets, and outdoor spaces from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. We provide comprehensive treatment solutions tailored to Mount Pleasant's unique environment, from residential yards near Thornwood to properties along the Taconic State Parkway.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Westchester County with EPA-approved treatments and licensed technicians who understand Mount Pleasant's specific tick challenges. Our seasonal protection plans and same-day service ensure your property remains safe year-round, with transparent pricing from $125-$325 based on property size and treatment needs.
localContext: Mount Pleasant's mix of suburban homes, townhouse communities, and properties backing onto the Rockefeller State Park Preserve creates ideal tick habitats in wooded edges and tall grass areas. We regularly service neighborhoods throughout Hawthorne, Thornwood, Valhalla, and Pleasantville, protecting families who enjoy their yards and the area's many hiking trails and recreational spaces.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Mount Pleasant typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through July. However, deer ticks can be active whenever temperatures rise above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important in our area.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Mount Pleasant range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, level of infestation, and whether you choose a one-time treatment or seasonal protection plan. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for all Mount Pleasant properties.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and allowing 2-3 hours for the treatment to dry before resuming normal outdoor activities.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick control treatment in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: We recommend seasonal treatments every 4-6 weeks during tick season (spring through fall) for optimal protection. Many Mount Pleasant homeowners choose our comprehensive seasonal packages that include 3-4 treatments timed to interrupt the tick life cycle and provide continuous protection.
